Interrupt Claim/Complete

Absolute Address:
Base Offset:
0x200004
Size:
0x4
Source:
plic_rf.rdl

Description

Read: returns the ID of the highest-priority pending interrupt enabled for Hart 0 M-Mode (0 if none pending). The corresponding pending bit is cleared on read. Write: signals completion of the interrupt handler for the written interrupt ID.

Contents

Bits Identifier Access Reset Decoded Name
[31:0] interrupt_id rw - Interrupt ID

Field Descriptions

interrupt_id - Interrupt ID

Read: ID of highest pending interrupt (0=none). Write: complete interrupt with given ID.
